findings.summary: Tag cleanup functions catch and swallow I/O errors. Callers cannot tell if cleanup succeeded.
evidence: release_processing_tag and remove_stale_queue_tag in src/common/tags.py catch (OSError, httpx.HTTPError) and log but never propagate.
findings.suggestion: This is intentional best-effort cleanup and acceptable for background tag operations.

findings.summary: _create_with_compat returns None on failure while _create_completion raises on exhausted retries.
evidence: _create_with_compat catches BadRequestError and APIError returning None, while the retry decorator in _create_completion raises after max retries.
findings.suggestion: The None return is intentional to enable model fallback in the caller loop.
